name: Super Bomberman
description: Bomberman subseries beginning on Super Nintendo, focused on 16-bit maze action and local multiplayer party play.

eras.title: SNES Multiplayer Era
eras.description: The Super Nintendo entries define the branch through four-player local multiplayer and expanded Bomberman party play.

eras.title: Modern Revival Era
eras.description: Super Bomberman returns as Konami's modern Bomberman branch.
